mapper.select: SELECT * FROM product ORDER BY category, product_name
SELECT * FROM product WHERE category = #{category} ORDER BY product_name
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO product (product_id, product_name, description, price, category, icon) VALUES (#{productId}, #{productName}, #{description}, #{price}, #{category}, #{icon})
mapper.update: UPDATE product SET product_name = #{productName}, description = #{description}, price = #{price}, category = #{category}, icon = #{icon}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE product_id = #{productId}
